name: Peanut Chicken B1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 3/4 inch chunks.
2. Mix 2 tablespoons of cornstarch and 1 egg white with the chicken.
3. Preheat the wok.
4. Add oil and heat to 250°F.
5. Put in the coated chicken and stir to separate the chicken chunks.
6. Cook for 3 minutes.
7. Drain the chicken.
8. Pour off the oil.
9. Stir-fry onions in the greased wok for 1 minute.
10. Pour in soy sauce and stir.
11. Add celery, chicken, and broth.
12. Bring to a boil.
13. Mix the remaining 2 tablespoons of cornstarch with water.
14. Stir into the broth mixture until thickened.
15. Add peanuts and serve immediately.
